div.p: A parser is a function from input string to an optional (value, rest) pair.

ul.li: Succeeds: returns Just (a, rest) where a is the parsed value and rest is the unconsumed input.
Just (a, rest) → pass rest to f a; return whatever f a produces
Nothing → skip f; propagate failure (like Maybe monad)

g.title: Run parser p on input. On success produce (a, rest).
Feed rest to f(a). f(a) is itself a parser for b.
Parser p fails on this input.
Run parser p on input. On success produce (a, rest).
Feed rest to f(a). f(a) is itself a parser for b.
Parser p fails on this input.
